snippet: Schools must ensure that: In preparation for excursions, and in addition to the information required in the consent documentation, schools should advise students and parents/carers of: In some cases, students may require specific skills or training before going on excursions, particularly when undertaking swimming and water-based activities. Staff should utilise the Student skills swimming and water-based activities template (DOCX) External Link to assess students’ suitability to undertake the activity and what support they may need. In extreme cases the excursion staff, following consultation with and the approval of the school principal, may decide to return a student to their home from an excursion. Excursion staff should: Supervision Chapter in the Excursion Guidelines outlining supervision re... Liability, waivers and indemnities Chapter in the Excursion Guidelines explaining duty of care ... Chapter in the Excursion Guidelines outlining requirements relating to student preparation and behaviour Reviewed 22 April 2024
